Operation 'getCurrencyRates' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic in Ukrainian. Description lacks clarity about return format (array of CurrencyInfo objects) and doesn't explicitly state this is a public endpoint. Improved version specifies the action, return type, caching behavior, and authentication requirements for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Отримати базовий перелік курсів валют monobank. Інформація кешується та оновлюється не частіше 1 разу на 5 хвилин.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current list of currency exchange rates for monobank. Returns an array of currency pairs with buy, sell, and cross rates. Data is cached and updated at most once every 5 minutes. No authentication required.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic in Ukrainian. Description lacks clarity about return format (array of CurrencyInfo objects) and doesn't explicitly state this is a public endpoint. Improved version specifies the action, return type, caching behavior, and authentication requirements for better AI agent understanding.

Description is incomplete - doesn't specify return format (SyncInfo schema) or explain why this endpoint is needed. data.current_description: Отримати відкритий ключ банку, його ідентифікатор, а також час серверу.
data.summary_suggestion: Get bank public key and server sync info
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the bank's public key (for cryptographic operations), the key identifier, and current server time. Returns a SyncInfo object containing the public key, key ID, and server timestamp. No authentication required. Used for synchronization and secure communication with the bank.
data.reasoning: Original summary doesn't explain the purpose of the public key. Description is incomplete - doesn't specify return format (SyncInfo schema) or explain why this endpoint is needed. Improved version clarifies the cryptographic purpose, return structure, and use case for AI agents.

message: Operation 'getClientInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is too vague and doesn't indicate authentication requirement. data.current_description: Отримання інформації про клієнта та переліку його рахунків і банок. Обмеження на використання функції не частіше ніж 1 раз у 60 секунд.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve authenticated client profile and accounts
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about the authenticated client including personal data, list of accounts, and associated cards. Returns a UserInfo object containing client details and all linked accounts and cards. Requires valid authentication token. Rate limited to once per 60 seconds.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too vague and doesn't indicate authentication requirement. Description lacks specificity about return format (UserInfo schema) and doesn't clearly state what 'banks' refers to (cards). Improved version specifies authentication requirement, return type, and rate limiting for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'setWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is too generic. Description is overly detailed and difficult to parse for AI agents. Improved version clarifies the purpose (real-time notifications), validation flow, retry behavior, and response requirements in a more structured way. Better highlights side effects (automatic disabling) and authentication requirement.

data.current_description:
Встановлення URL користувача:
- Для підтвердження коректності наданої адреси, на неї надсилається GET-запит. Сервер має відповісти строго HTTP статус-кодом 200, і ніяким іншим. Якщо валідацію пройдено, на задану адресу починають надсилатися POST запити з подіями.
- Події надсилаються у наступному вигляді: POST запит на задану адресу у форматі `{type:"StatementItem", data:{account:"...", statementItem:{#StatementItem}}}`. Якщо сервіс користувача не відповість протягом 5с на команду, сервіс повторить спробу ще через 60 та 600 секунд. Якщо на третю спробу відповідь отримана не буде, функція буде вимкнута. Відповідь сервера має строго містити HTTP статус-код 200.
data.summary_suggestion: Register webhook URL for transaction notifications
data.description_suggestion: Registers a webhook URL to receive real-time notifications about account balance changes. The provided URL is validated by sending a GET request - the server must respond with HTTP 200 to confirm. Once validated, the webhook receives POST requests with transaction events in format {type:"StatementItem", data:{account:"...", statementItem:{...}}}. Requires authentication. Retry policy: 3 attempts at 0s, 60s, and 600s intervals. If all retries fail, the webhook is automatically disabled. Your server must respond with HTTP 200 to each event.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is overly detailed and difficult to parse for AI agents. Improved version clarifies the purpose (real-time notifications), validation flow, retry behavior, and response requirements in a more structured way. Better highlights side effects (automatic disabling) and authentication requirement.

message: Operation 'getStatement' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too vague (just 'Statement'). Description lacks clarity about parameters, return type, and has formatting issues. Improved version specifies the action, clearly documents all three path parameters with their formats, explains the time window constraint, specifies return type (StatementItems array), and includes authentication and rate limit info for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Отримання виписки за час від {from} до {to} часу в секундах в форматі Unix time Максимальний час за який можливо отримувати виписку 31 доба + 1 година (2682000 секунд) Обмеження на використання функції не частіше ніж 1 раз у 60 секунд.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve account transaction statement for date range
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of transactions (StatementItems) for a specific account within a specified time range. Parameters: account (account ID), from (Unix timestamp in seconds), to (Unix timestamp in seconds). Maximum query period is 31 days + 1 hour (2,682,000 seconds). Returns an array of StatementItem objects. Requires authentication. Rate limited to once per 60 seconds.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too vague (just 'Statement'). Description lacks clarity about parameters, return type, and has formatting issues. Improved version specifies the action, clearly documents all three path parameters with their formats, explains the time window constraint, specifies return type (StatementItems array), and includes authentication and rate limit info for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description:
Встановлення URL користувача:
- Для підтвердження коректності наданої адреси, на неї надсилається GET-запит. Сервер має відповісти строго HTTP статус-кодом 200, і ніяким іншим. Якщо валідацію пройдено, на задану адресу починають надсилатися POST запити з подіями.
- Події надсилаються у наступному вигляді: POST запит на задану адресу у форматі `{type:"StatementItem", data:{account:"...", statementItem:{#StatementItem}}}`. Якщо сервіс користувача не відповість протягом 5с на команду, сервіс повторить спробу ще через 60 та 600 секунд. Якщо на третю спробу відповідь отримана не буде, функція буде вимкнута. Відповідь сервера має строго містити HTTP статус-код 200.
data.summary_suggestion: Register webhook URL for transaction notifications
data.description_suggestion: Registers a webhook URL to receive real-time notifications about account balance changes. Requires SetWebHook object with target URL. Validation: server sends GET request to URL, expecting HTTP 200 response. Upon validation, server sends POST requests with transaction events in format {type:"StatementItem", data:{account:"...", statementItem:{...}}}. Retry policy: 3 attempts at 0s, 60s, and 600s intervals. Webhook disabled after 3 failed attempts. Client must respond with HTTP 200 within 5 seconds. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic and doesn't specify the purpose (transaction notifications). Description is overly detailed but lacks structure and clarity about side effects (webhook activation/deactivation). Improved version clarifies the purpose, input requirements (SetWebHook schema), validation flow, retry behavior, and side effects in a more organized manner for AI agent understanding.
